issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated'. This is a passive static ability that checks a condition when the card enters play, not an activated ability.
Duration should be 'Permanent' not 'EndOfTurn'. The card text states 'this Character gains [Rush]' with no time limit specified, indicating a permanent effect as long as the condition is met.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, this Character gains [Rush].
